title: michelia odora
intro: Michelia odora, also known as the Yulan Magnolia or Night-Blooming Magnolia, is a flowering evergreen tree native to southern China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and alkaloids. The health benefits of Michelia odora include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
